events.name: Occupation
events.place: Along with the majority of High Sheriffs, he was removed from office for corruption.

events.name: He founded Butley Priory for Black Canons in Suffolk.
He founded Leiston Abbey, for White Canons.
After the death of King Henry, Glanvill was removed from his office by King Richard I on 17 September 1189 and imprisoned until he paid a ransom, according to one authority, of £15,000.
He took the cross, and died at the siege of Acre in 1190.
events.date: shortly after given his freedom by King Richard I on 17 September 1189

events.name: Death
events.place: Siege of Acre, Kingdom of Yerushalayim, Israel

zh.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可史達科特 聖 安德魯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England於大約1120年出生在英國素福爾可史達科特 聖 安德魯時，他的父親Hervey de Glanville56歲，母親Domina Matilda de Castleacre26歲。他於大約1146年與Bertha Valoines結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1174年登記服兵役。他於1180年被列為chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii。他去世於1191年10月21日在以色列מחוז ירושלים也盧沙阿萊姆享年72歲，埋葬在英國越可爾可福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England于大约1120年出生在英国素福爾可史達科特 聖 安德魯时，他的父亲Hervey de Glanville56岁，母亲Domina Matilda de Castleacre26岁。他于大约1146年与Bertha Valoines结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1174年登记服兵役。他于1180年被列为chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii。他去世于1191年10月21日在以色列מחוז ירושלים也盧沙阿萊姆享年72岁，埋葬在英国越可爾可福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England was born about 1120, in Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, his father, Hervey de Glanville, was 56 and his mother, Domina Matilda de Castleacre, was 26. He married Bertha Valoines about 1146. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1174. In 1180, his occupation is listed as chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii. He died on 21 October 1191, in Yerushalayim, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 72, and was buried in Coverham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England est né environ 1120, à Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Hervey de Glanville, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Domina Matilda de Castleacre, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Bertha Valoines environ 1146. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1174. En 1180, sa profession de son indiquée est chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1191, à Yerushalayim, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Coverham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England um 1120 in Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hervey de Glanville 56 und seine Mutter Domina Matilda de Castleacre 26. Er hat um 1146 Bertha Valoines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1174 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1180 ist sein Beruf als chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1191 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Yerushalayim, Jerusalem, Israel und wurde in Coverham, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England è nato il circa 1120 nel Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Hervey de Glanville, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Domina Matilda de Castleacre, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Bertha Valoines circa 1146. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1174. Nel 1180, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii. Morì il 21 ottobre 1191, nel Yerushalayim, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Coverham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of Englandが約1120年にイギリススフォルクストラトフォード スト アンドリューで生まれた時，父Hervey de Glanvilleは56歳，母Domina Matilda de Castleacreは26歳であった。約1146年にBertha Valoinesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年に兵役登録をした。1180年，職業はchief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry iiと記録されている。彼は1191年10月21日にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםイエルシャレイイムで72歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアコバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 앤드루
ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 앤드루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey de Glanville(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Domina Matilda de Castleacre(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1146년 Bertha Valoines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1180년, 그의 직업은 chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii이었다. 그는 1191년 10월 21일 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים 예루샤레이임에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 커버함에 묻혔다.

pt.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hervey de Glanville, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Domina Matilda de Castleacre, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha Valoines aproximadamente 1146. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1174. Em 1180, sua profissão aparece como chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1191, em Yerushalayim, Jerusalem, Israel, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: стратфорд ст андрю, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England родился около 1120 г. в местности стратфорд ст андрю, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hervey de Glanville было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Domina Matilda de Castleacre, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha Valoines около 1146 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1174 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1180 годуработал по профессии chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii. Он умер 21 октября 1191 г. в местности ииршэлеиим, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ковирам, еркшир, Англия.

es.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England nació aproximadamente 1120, en Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hervey de Glanville, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Domina Matilda de Castleacre, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Bertha Valoines aproximadamente 1146. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1174. En 1180, su ocupación registrada era chief justiciar of england during the reign of king henry ii. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1191, en Yerushalayim, Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
